_note: Connector-derived EXIT-leg (SLD) commission per NYSE trading day, post-reset (>2026-05-18T10:05:00Z). Source: IBKR get_account_trades(DAYS_30), 2026-06-06. Same basis as daily_metrics.record_pending_exits (exit leg only). Used by backfill_commission.py to standardize cumulative_pnl.json daily_history[date].commission. Pre-reset AVDL.CVR excluded.
